title: Prefer project-declared tools before generic fallbacks
observed_behavior: Agent avoided a generic fallback after project instructions named a specific tool path.

evidence.summary: Local reproduction using a redacted repository instruction and command trace.

pattern: When repository instructions name a specific tool, use that tool before a generic fallback.
operational_rule: Check project instructions and declared tooling before choosing an equivalent generic command.
when_to_use: Repository instructions name a required tool
Multiple tools can perform the same operation
when_not_to_use: Named tool would expose private data or require missing credentials
counterexamples: A generic local parser is acceptable when the declared cloud tool is unavailable and the task is local-only.

privacy_review.note: Session-specific paths and user details removed.
